docs.title: Role Target: Senior MLOps Engineer / Data Platform Architect / Systems Lead
A. Resume / Indeed Summary (Concise & High-Impact)
docs.text: Senior Systems & Data Architect with 30+ years of expertise in high-stakes infrastructure, compliance, and large-scale data systems. Proven track record of transitioning legacy environments to modern, automated architectures in FedRAMP environments. Expert in engineering robust ETL pipelines, optimizing infrastructure reliability (Ansible/FreeIPA), and leveraging Python/SQL to derive actionable insights. Currently bridging the gap between deep systems-level knowledge and modern AI/ML workflows (MLOps).

docs.title: B. LinkedIn "About" (Conversational & Visionary)
docs.text:
I bridge the gap between "bare-metal" stability and the future of AI. With a career spanning from Air Force RADAR technician to Cloud Engineering Technical Leader at Cisco, I’ve seen every layer of the stack.

My current mission: Scaling AI/ML infrastructure without sacrificing security or performance. Whether it's migrating mission-critical FedRAMP identities to High-Availability FreeIPA clusters or building RAG-based AI knowledge graphs in my home lab (The Edgewood Lab), I focus on one thing: making complex systems work at scale.

I thrive at the intersection of Systems Architecture, Data Engineering, and MLOps.

docs.title: A. AI / ML & Data Engineering
docs.text:
• Infrastructure: MLOps, Vector Databases (Qdrant), Multi-Agent Orchestration (Hermes/LiteLLM).
  • Data Science: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib), Jupyter Notebooks, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).
  • Database: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLAlchemy (ORM), ETL Pipelines, Data Normalization.

docs.title: B. Cloud & Systems Architecture
docs.text:
• Identity & Security: FreeIPA/LDAP, RBAC/HBAC, FedRAMP, Qualys Compliance, STIG/CIS Hardening.
  • Automation: Ansible (Expert), Bash/Python Scripting, Jenkins/Gerrit CI/CD.
  • Infrastructure: OpenStack, Cisco UCS, VMware vSphere, Proxmox, Ceph (Storage).

docs.title: D. Leadership & Methodology
docs.text:
• Leadership: Team management, tech support/QA rotation, mentoring, leading by example.
  • QA/Testing: Root Cause Analysis (RCA), Test Case Design, Performance Benchmarking.

docs.title: Cisco | Cloud Engineering Technical Leader
docs.text: Aug 2019 – Present (Remote) * Identity Modernization (FedRAMP): Architected and led the migration of a mission-critical FedRAMP identity environment from legacy 389ds to a High-Availability (HA) FreeIPA cluster across dual data centers. * Security Posture: Implemented Host-Based Access Control (HBAC) to enforce strict security policies, ensuring audit-ready compliance for government-grade environments. * Infrastructure-as-Code: Engineered complex Ansible playbooks for reproducible, iterative deployments, reducing manual configuration drift by an estimated 80%. * Compliance Intelligence: Reverse-engineered QualysETL core logic to build custom extraction pipelines, mapping complex API schemas into actionable business intelligence for SOC teams. * Skills: Ansible, FreeIPA, Python, Qualys, OpenStack, RHEL, FedRAMP.

docs.title: Select Group @ Cisco | Cloud DevOps/QA Engineer (Contract)
docs.text: Feb 2016 – Aug 2019 (Remote) * Performance Optimization: Identified and removed redundant nova-scheduler filters, reducing instance scheduling time for 700 nodes from 20 seconds to 5 seconds (75% improvement). * Stability Engineering: Resolved a critical race condition in Windows 2008/2012 images within OpenStack that caused intermittent reboots during setup. * Infrastructure Evaluation: Built and evaluated Proxmox clusters for potential integration with Cisco InterCloud Services. * Cloud QA: Managed global test cycles for Compute and Heat components of Cisco’s OpenStack Public Cloud during major upgrades.

docs.title: Australian Laboratory Services | Senior Systems Administrator
docs.text: Sep 2014 – Jan 2016 (Grand Junction, CO) * Storage Innovation: Built an Ubuntu-based Ceph cluster for ESXi hosts, utilizing Ceph RBD snapshots to enable zero-error database migrations. * Automation: Implemented SaltStack for rapid provisioning of Linux VMs and Ceph nodes. * Data Integrity: Wrote Python/SQLAlchemy scripts to validate foreign keys during massive database migrations.

docs.title: Garfield County School District 16 | Senior Systems/Network Administrator
docs.text: Oct 2002 – Jun 2014 (Parachute, CO) * Process Automation: Developed a custom Flask/SQLAlchemy web application that synchronized Student Information Systems with Active Directory and Google Apps. * Impact: Achieved a 97% reduction in recurring helpdesk support calls regarding account resets. * Cost Efficiency: Saved the district $60k by implementing thin clients/terminal servers across 6 new computer labs. * Infrastructure: Deployed Ruckus wireless bridges to increase WAN bandwidth by 6,500% (1.5Mbps to 100Mbps) with zero monthly service costs.

docs.title: Foundational Experience (1991 – 2002)
docs.text:
• StorageSoft/Phoenix Tech: Sales Engineer & Technical Services Manager. Managed QA/Support teams, merged departments for 30% productivity gains.
  • United States Air Force: Airborne Warning and Control Radar Journeyman (AWACS). Developed foundational "first-principles" troubleshooting for high-power microwave and digital electronics.

docs.title: A. SecondBrian (Multi-Agent AI Orchestration)
docs.text:
• Scope: Built a private, server-grade AI orchestration framework (Hermes/LiteLLM) on a T5600 workstation (128GB RAM).
  • Tech: Qdrant (Vector DB), LLM-based Knowledge Graphs (RAG), Multi-agent workflows for technical research and automation.

docs.title: B. Metabolic Health Analytics
docs.text:
• Scope: Engineered a data pipeline to automate GKI (Glucose-Ketone Index) calculation using therapeutic data.
  • Tech: Python (Pandas/Matplotlib), SQL, Data Visualization.

docs.title: 5. Education & Certifications
docs.text:
• U.S. Air Force: Electronics Technician / RADAR Specialist (AWACS).
  • Colorado School of Mines: 2 Years (Chemistry focus).

docs.title: 6. Keywords (For ATS & Indeed Filters)
docs.text: MLOps, Data Engineering, Systems Architecture, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), Ansible, FreeIPA, FedRAMP, Python, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, RAG, AI Orchestration, OpenStack, CI/CD, Qualys, Linux Administration (RHEL/Ubuntu/CentOS).

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
